name: Capital Battery
notable: 100 MW / 200 MWh BESS adjacent to TransGrid's Queanbeyan substation near Canberra. Awarded to Neoen under ACT Government renewables tender. Commissioning delayed nearly a year due to connection compliance issues under Doosan GridTech's EPC scope, resulting in liquidated damages — a landmark outcome for Australian battery contracting.

timeline.title: Construction begins in ACT
timeline.detail: Neoen commenced construction of 100MW/200MWh battery using Doosan GridTech systems near Canberra. Provecta as delivery partner.

timeline.title: Commercial operations commenced
timeline.detail: Commencement date from AEMO registration via OpenElectricity.

timeline.title: First generation recorded
timeline.detail: First market dispatch data recorded in AEMO systems.

timeline.title: Extended commissioning delays due to connection issues
timeline.detail: Capital Battery experienced ~12 months of commissioning delays caused by grid connection issues. Neoen reported seeking damages from relevant parties.

timeline.title: Commercial operations finally commence
timeline.detail: Capital Battery entered commercial operations after nearly a year of commissioning delays. ACT's first large-scale battery storage.
